'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 127''' was the one hundred twenty-seventh issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[June 2]], [[2004]]. It was authored by [[Andrew Darling]], [[Chris Gardner]], [[Matthew Harvey]] and [[Iain Lowson]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends#History|History of the Rebellion]]
*[[Senate Guard/Legends|Senate Guard]]
*[[Samuel Tomas Gillespee]]
*[[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla the Hutt]]
*[[Frija Torlock]]
*[[Ros Lai]]
*[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine Architecture]]
*[[B3NK|B3-NK]]
*[[Spray stick/Legends|Stokhli Spray Stick]]
*''[[Nebulon Ranger]]''
